sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Tourmaline Guardian Lion Nazar Battu – Your Shield Against Negativity & Nazar! 🦁✨

Infuse your space with powerful protection and prosperity with the Tourmaline Guardian Crafted with energy-cleansing Tourmaline, this majestic lion serves as a guardian against negativity while attracting positivity, abundance, and good fortune into your home.

Designed to be both stylish and spiritually empowering, this nazar bath not only enhances the aesthetic appeal of your space but also fosters an aura of clarity and protection. Simply place it on the entrance of your space, and let the negative energy stay away every day! 🦁✨

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
- Black Tourmaline Guardian Form – Crafted in a bold lion design using black tourmaline, symbolizing strength, protection, and dominance over negative forces.

- Nazar Battu Concept (7 Inches) – Designed as a powerful nazar protector, ideal for entrances, offices, or living spaces to guard against unwanted energies.

- Statement Décor Piece – The detailed lion carving and deep black finish create a strong, premium visual impact in any setting.

- Versatile Placement – Can be placed at entrances, desks, or shelves to act as both a protective symbol and a decorative centerpiece.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
🧪 Ingredients

Black Tourmaline – Known for protection, grounding, and energy shielding.

Innovation

• Tourmaline-based protection design creates a strong energetic shield against negativity.

• Guardian lion symbolism represents authority, strength, and fearless protection.

• Nazar battu concept inspired by traditional elements for everyday safeguarding.

• Bold statement décor with intricate carving and premium visual presence.

• Perfect fusion of spiritual protection and luxury aesthetic appeal.

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
Protection from the Evil Eye: Keeps harmful intentions and negative energies at bay.

Attracts Positivity and Prosperity: Boosts confidence, motivation, and financial growth.

Natural Energy Amplifier: Enhances your aura and strengthens your inner energy.

Timeless Elegance: Beautifully designed, combining aesthetics with functionality.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Simply place the magnet on your fridge or any magnetic surface to enjoy its protective and positive energy. For best results, position it in a spot where it can continuously radiate good vibes throughout your space.
